qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: Consider the resolution of the domain name by a resolver. Assume that no resource records are cached anywhere across the servers and that iterative query mechanism is used in the resolution. The number of query-response pairs involved in completely resolving the domain name is ________________.
